creator: ports@grosbein.net
text:
Edwin Groothuis wrote:
> Maintainer of net/AquaGatekeeper,
> 
> Please note that PR ports/143097 has just been submitted.
> 
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
> 
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>     http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/143097
> 

This PR is obsoleted by ports/143131 that I've sent before seen
this one. Please close this as duplicate.

Eugene Grosbein
